title: Knarfy's Dumb Food Ideas 2
description: A collection of terrible food ideas based on comments. Created originally for Knarfy's Channel!
body:
# Knarfy's Dumb Food Ideas 2

These are just as dumb as you'd expect!

Today I coded your terrible food ideas into Minecraft and hosted a Thanksgiving dinner with a bunch of my friends! If you want to host your own thanksgiving, or you want to mess with the features yourself, this is the place to be!

This mod has a total of **75 individual features** coded based on 33 comments from Knarfy's YouTube audience. It's pure chaos, and we love it that way!

**Check out the original video on Knarfy's Channel here:** 
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6Es5jHJYiJw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Every Item:

![Every Item in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a36c70edfc820df539366b28650cbbbc06955625.png)

### ⚠️ WARNING:
Do not use this mod on a world you genuinely like! It will blow things up, and will cause unwanted destruction. It was designed to explode, and it does that super well.
